evals.prompt: How should I implement common system design best practices?
evals.expected_output: **SoC**: Divide into distinct sections per concern.

evals.prompt: What are the common anti-patterns to avoid in common system design?
Give me a quick-start example for common system design.
evals.expected_output: **Fail Fast**: Fail visibly when errors occur.

should_not_trigger: Set up a basic common project from scratch
How do I install common dependencies?
Configure CI/CD for an unrelated platform
